content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +1.36%, all sectors green, VIX down 5.87% to 16.99 — strong risk-on tone. Auto, Realty leading; banking and IT participating. Book is +1.28% on the day with all positions in green. Priority is to lock in gains via tighter trailing stops, not to chase fresh breakout entries late in the session.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24050,
      "nifty_resistance": 24500
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1045.12,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Held +8.3% — already at strong gain. SL at 1045 is just below entry+breakeven and protects ~6% of move. Current SL is fine. NO-OP MODIFY would be wasted; switching to HOLD via position_actions instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down 2.6%, gold weakening on Iran de-escalation hopes and risk-on session. SL at 119 is intact (~2.4% below CMP). Hold as macro hedge but watch — if SL hits, exit cleanly. Thesis still valid given crude at $111 and continued geopolitical tension."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1445.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Held +3.7%. Current SL of 1445 is already above entry (1412.94) — locked in breakeven+. No-op MODIFY; using HOLD in position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Only +0.5% — not yet at +2% trail trigger. SL at 401 (0.86% below entry). Q4 results May 15 catalyst pending. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1745.00,
      "new_target": 1810.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Already at SL 1745 (above entry 1734) — breakeven+ locked. No-op; HOLD via position_actions. Organon deal adds debt/execution risk; not adding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+0.5%, SL at 319 (0.47% below entry). Q4 results May 18-19 catalyst. Hold below trail trigger."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Held +3.1% with strong Q4 print + Rs 5.25 dividend. Current SL 475 is already above entry (469) — at +1.3% locked. Tightening SL up to 478 (still above entry, captures more gain after today's +6.95% surge). Stock at 52w high zone — protect gains."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+1.1%, SL at 615 (above entry 612 — breakeven+ locked). Stock goes ex-dividend April 30 — expect ~Rs 11 mechanical drop. SL of 615 may trigger on ex-div; that is acceptable given dividend captures the value. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already have an OPEN BUY order at 200 from earlier. Stock now at 203.15, +11.7% on the day. Order may not fill at 200 — but per ORDER HYGIENE rules I will NOT stack a second order. Letting existing limit work; if it expires unfilled, will reassess tomorrow. Chasing a +11.7% breakout with fresh entry is poor risk-reward."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY at 443 placed 56+ hours ago — stale. Power sector showing mixed signals (NTPCGREEN -5.4% on the day) and book is already heavy on power/energy (NTPC, POWERGRID, COALINDIA). Cancel to free capital and reduce cluster exposure."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending order from 9+ hours ago, no longer in watchlist focus, pharma sector facing tariff overhang. Cancel to free capital."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending order from 54+ hours ago — clearly not filling. Cancel."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1045.12,
      "reasoning": "+8.3% gain. SL at 1045 already locks in solid profit (~6% above entry). Original target 1110 still ~4% upside. Could trail tighter but stock rallied hard last 5 days; want to give room for continuation. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Down 2.6%. SL at 119 (~2.4% below CMP). Macro hedge against oil/geopolitical risk. Let SL handle exit if breached."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1445.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1445, well above entry 1412.94. Locks in 2.3%+ minimum. At 52w high zone today, allow run to 1500 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 401.00,
      "reasoning": "+0.5% only — not at trail trigger threshold. SL 401 acceptable. Q4 catalyst May 15."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1745.00,
      "reasoning": "SL above entry already. Organon deal adds risk; not raising stop further given pharma tariff overhang."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 319.00,
      "reasoning": "+0.5%, below trail trigger. Defensive utility hold. Q4 catalyst May 18-19."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 + dividend, +3.1% gain. Tighten SL from 475 to 478 to lock in more after today's +6.95% surge. Still gives ~1.1% room from CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 615.00,
      "reasoning": "Ex-dividend tomorrow (Rs 11/share). Mechanical drop expected. SL at 615 may trigger but dividend offsets. Acceptable."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BANDHANBNK: pending limit at 200 still working — letting it ride. Will reassess tomorrow if unfilled. ONGC, MARUTI, GRSE, BAJFINANCE: all up sharply today on results — CHASING HIGHS is poor risk-reward; wait for pullback to 5-EMA / VWAP. VEDL: demerger record-date risk + parent leverage red flags = pass despite catalyst. INDUSINDBK: SFIO probe / governance overhang — pass despite Q4 turnaround. TECHM: post-earnings cautious management commentary; IT sector in structural drawdown — wait.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 50% deployed with +1.28% session P&L — solid green day. Per deployment hysteresis rule, default disposition is NO new entries unless materially better setups. Rolling 5-day stats are concerning: 14% win rate, profit factor 0.4x, net -4408. Means recent entries are getting whipsawed — strong reason to TIGHTEN risk management, not loosen. Cancelled 3 stale pending orders (TATAPOWER, GLENMARK, PHARMABEES) to free capital and avoid cluster overconcentration in power. Energy/power cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA + GOLDBEES partial) is ~25% of book — at sector cluster threshold. No further power adds. Focus next 2 hours: monitor SLs, particularly HINDZINC (ex-div), and let winners run."
}
